nasb.text: If your countryman is not near you, or if you do not know him, then you shall bring it home to your house, and it shall remain with you until your countryman looks for it; then you shall restore it to him.

esv.text: And if he does not live near you and you do not know who he is, you shall bring it home to your house, and it shall stay with you until your brother seeks it. Then you shall restore it to him.

cnv.text: 如果你的兄弟離你很遠，或是你不認識他，你就要把牠牽到你家中，留在你那裡，等到你的兄弟來尋找牠，你就還給他。

ccb.text: 如果主人离你们很远，或者你们不知道主人是谁，就要把它牵回家，等主人来找时再还给主人。
